title: BareBones x BetterEnd
description: Converts the entire mod (BetterEnd) to the texture style (Barebones)
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b619293bfbc6b6d51a5b4517de564ed8ff040e96.png)

Simply a texture pack that retexturizes the betterend in barebones style.

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b97675689bc7e24a660a5c1e2ab2dcf492dcfd10.png)

⚠️CREDITS

Texture style: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones 
Mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/betterend
